title: Copper Powered Rails
description: Changes powered rails to be made from copper.
body: Changes powered rails to be made from copper, all that is changed is recipe and texture. [The Copper Rail](https://modrinth.com/mod/thecopperrail) mod is supported (only on 1.20 currently, I am trying to fix it), the copper rail is changed to be made from gold and renamed to directional rails. By using [Rail Compatibility Fix | Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rail-compatibility-fix-datapack) and [Rail Compatibility Fix | Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rail-compatibility-fix-resource-pack) 1.20.1+ will work with [The Copper Rail](https://modrinth.com/mod/thecopperrail).
